title: Pride Banner Trade
description: Adds pride flag banner trades to Shepherds.
body:
Adds pride flag banner trades to Shepherds' Master tier, 10 emeralds each. Supports Fabric 1.19.4+. **Requires Fabric API.**

Flags currently supported:

- Pride flag
- Lesbian flag
- Bisexual flag
- Transgender flag

More coming soon:tm:
